vile_herb.title: Find or craft a Vile Herb — the partial mitigation item for Sculk Sickness Stage progression

know_cure.title: Understand the full Sculk Sickness cure path: Vile Herb mitigates, Ambrosia (End materials) cures fully

subtitle.text: The Vile Herb slows the decay. Ambrosia ends it. The Ambrosia needs the End. Plan accordingly.

description: You don't notice Stage 1 until it's Stage 2.
You don't notice Stage 2 until it's 3.
You notice Stage 4. You notice it very clearly.
This quest is about what you do before Stage 4.
Slows stage progression — does not reverse it
Used repeatedly to hold at current stage
Also required ingredient: Cursed Eye recipe (Ch12)
Crafted from specific End dimension materials
Don't mine Sculk. Sneak near it. Leave quickly.
└ Found in: cave flora (rare), witch drops,
chorus flower variant + rare End drops
└ Full recipe revealed by Sculk Warning scroll
└ Cannot be crafted without first having been to The End
▸ Everyone who explored the Deep Dark too eagerly
The ones who came back prepared
▶ Find or craft a Vile Herb [check]
◇ The Cursed Eye (Ch12) also needs Vile Herb
Farm it now. You will need it twice.
